user_message: How do I set up a Teradata connector?

results.title: Snowflake connector setup
results.snippet: To connect Snowflake: provide account identifier, warehouse, database, schema, username, and password or private key. Use IAM role for production environments.

results.title: dbt lineage extraction
results.snippet: To extract dbt lineage, point the connector at the dbt project directory or manifest.json. The parser reads sources, models, and exposures automatically.
